testcase.name: test_project_created

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf94a99986f40>('prompt') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf94a99986f40> = {'created_at': '2026-05-14T00:40:29.976282+00:00', 'deploy_slug': None, 'deployed': False, 'description': '', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_e2e_audit.py:78: in test_project_created assert project.get("prompt") E AssertionError: assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf94a99986f40>('prompt') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf94a99986f40> = {'created_at': '2026-05-14T00:40:29.976282+00:00', 'deploy_slug': None, 'deployed': False, 'description': '', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_workflow_autostarted
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_e2e_audit.py:91: in test_workflow_autostarted assert len(wfs) >= 1, f"expected an auto-started workflow, got: {data}" E AssertionError: expected an auto-started workflow, got: {'items': []} E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_chat_generates_files_and_reconciles
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_e2e_audit.py:100: in test_chat_generates_files_and_reconciles assert r.status_code == 200, f"chat failed {r.status_code} {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: chat failed 502 {"detail":"AI returned no files"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_deploy_internal_and_poll
test_task_routing_table_multi_provider
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_e2e_audit.py:310: in test_task_routing_table_multi_provider assert len(suggested_providers) >= 2, ( E AssertionError: routing is hardcoded to a single provider: {'emergent'} E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len({'emergent'})
